generated_oml:
instance LiDARSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "LiDAR sensor capturing raw point cloud data for obstacle detection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARRawData
]

instance MotorSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring motor speed and position for vehicle state tracking"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorRawData
]

instance SteeringServoSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring steering angle and position for vehicle control"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringServoRawData
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor capturing vehicle state information including speed, position, and orientation"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateRawData
]

instance LiDARRawData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LiDARSensor
]

instance MotorRawData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorSensor
]

instance SteeringServoRawData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringServoSensor
]

instance VehicleStateRawData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Clustered and tracked object data from LiDAR point clouds"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARRawData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataMonitoringEnabler, ComputationOffloadingEnabler
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Serialized vehicle state information with unit conversions"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateRawData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataMonitoringEnabler, ComputationOffloadingEnabler
]

instance ProjectedDrivingPathData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Projected driving path data for adaptive cruise control"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataMonitoringEnabler
]

instance DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Serializes data, aligns message types, and performs unit conversions for ROS2 and UDP communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoring
]

instance PointCloudClusteringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Processes raw LiDAR point clouds into clustered and tracked object data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoring
]

instance DataMonitoringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enables real-time visualization and reporting services"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoring
]

instance ComputationOffloadingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Offloads ACC system computations to cloud infrastructure"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloading
]

instance RemoteManagementEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enables remote management of ACC system via user interface"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagement
]

instance DataMonitoring : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state, object tracks, projected driving path, and reporting for operators and developers"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateVisualization, ObjectTracksVisualization, ProjectedPathVisualization, ReportingInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloading : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloads lead vehicle detection, speed computation, and actuation commands from vehicle ECUs to cloud infrastructure"
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetectionInsight, SpeedComputationInsight, ActuationCommandAction
]

instance RemoteManagement : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enables operators to enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, and send emergency braking commands via UI"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction, DisableACCAction, SetDesiredSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakeAction
]

instance VehicleStateVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle speed, position, and orientation data"
]

instance ObjectTracksVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of detected object tracks from LiDAR data"
]

instance ProjectedPathVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of adaptive cruise control projected driving path"
]

instance ReportingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Reporting capabilities for system diagnostics and operational status"
]

instance LeadVehicleDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of lead vehicles for adaptive cruise control"
]

instance SpeedComputationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Computation of optimal speed based on distance to lead vehicle"
]

instance ActuationCommandAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Actuation commands for acceleration and braking sent to vehicle ECUs"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "User-initiated enable command for adaptive cruise control system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "User-initiated disable command for adaptive cruise control system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "User-set desired speed parameter for adaptive cruise control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakeAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "User-initiated emergency braking command override"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains "ThreeDVisualization", "ControlPanel"
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains "DataManagementComponent", "ControlComponent"
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains "DataPreprocessingComponent", "ActuationComponent", "DeviceCommunicationComponent"
]

instance DataPreprocessingComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical Twin component handling raw sensor data pre-processing"
]

instance ActuationComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical Twin component managing vehicle actuation commands"
]

instance DeviceCommunicationComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical Twin component handling Wi-Fi UDP communication with Digital Twin"
]

instance DataManagementComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital Twin component managing data flow and storage"
]

instance ControlComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital Twin component handling control logic and offloading computations"
]

instance ThreeDVisualization : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User interface component for 3D visualization of vehicle and environment"
]

instance ControlPanel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User interface component for ACC control and monitoring"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands (e.g., motor actuation, steering servo) are generated by the Controlling FE, translated via the Data Translation component, and transmitted over Wi-Fi UDP to the Actuation FE. ROS2 handles internal software component communication within the Digital Twin system."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The system requires 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy for computation offloading in safety-critical vehicular applications, as mandated by industry standards and constrained by hardware limitations, ensuring temporal consistency between physical and digital components."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Architected using ISO 23247 Reference Architecture (RA), software components are mapped to Functional Entities (FEs) implemented as ROS2 packages. Each FE is realized as ROS2 nodes organized into three entities: User Entity (with 3D Visualization and Control Panel), Digital Twin Entity (data management and control), and Physical Twin Entity (data pre-processing, actuation, and Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking), with the Physical Twin Entity representing a deviation from ISO 23247 by hosting general automotive functionality."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Internal communication between software components uses ROS2; inter-entity communication (e.g., between Physical Twin and Digital Twin entities) occurs over Wi-Fi using UDP transport layer. No details on bandwidth, latency, network topology, redundancy, or security protocols are specified."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with ISO 23247 standard, which includes four parts: Overview and general principles, Reference architecture, Digital representation of physical manufacturing elements, and Information exchange. Interoperability standards such as OPC Unified Architecture (OPC UA) are referenced for data collection and device control entity implementations."
]
